positive.prompt: Audit this file upload handler for vulnerabilities
Is this login flow safe against the OWASP top ten?
Harden the webhook endpoint that fetches user-supplied URLs

negative.prompt: Set up the release tagging workflow

evals.prompt: Harden an endpoint that accepts a user-supplied webhook URL and fetches it server-side.
evals.expected_output: Threat-modeled hardening: allowlisting, private-IP blocking, and validated input with tests
expectations: Trust boundaries are identified before controls are proposed
SSRF protections cover private and reserved addresses, not just scheme checks
Input validation is enforced at the boundary
No secrets are logged or exposed in errors
